Nimbus Mono

• Jolly Jumperstars62 - Made in Phaser. Play it now!

• XML Parsing with PHP - This book covers parsing and validating XML documents, leveraging XPath expressions, and working with namespaces as well as how to create and modify XML files programmatically.
• Academic Search - Search across .edu and other educational domains. These materials are more reliable than the big Internet.
• IGM Economic Experts Panel - Top economists reflect on policy-related issues. Some answers contain useful details.
• IDEAS RePEc - The largest database of economics publications (2,000,000 items). Searching through papers is easier with Google: site:ideas.repec.org <search term>. Index sources mentioned below.
• NBER - Working papers by major researchers. Many of these papers get published in peer-reviewed journal.
• Google Scholar - Searching academic literature in general. Features author pages and citation counters. If you look for economic writings only, IDEAS would be more powerful.
• IMF Data - The standard reference for macro data.
• Monetary Economics: Data Sources - Overview of macro data sources.
• OFFSTATS - Links to official data sources by country and subject.
• American Economic Association: Graduate Training in Economics - Overview of the programs, requirements, and advices to those considering a PhD program in economics.
• Job Openings for Economists - The job board by the American Economic Association.
• Alembicstars117 - Functional JSON parsing, mapping to objects, and serialize to JSON.
• ueberauth_vkstars18 - vk.com Strategy for Überauth.

• Composedstars49 - A library to parse your project's Composer environment at runtime.
• uvCharts - JavaScript Charting library built using d3.js
• EJSChartstars34 - enterprise ready charting library.
• Chartkickstars6k - JavaScript charts with one line of Ruby.
• Smoothie Chartsstars2.2k - JavaScript charts for realtime streaming data.

• tmuxomaticstars1k Intelligent tmux session management
• tmux2htmlstars653 🐈 Render full tmux windows or individual panes as HTML

• tmux-plugins Official tmux plugins
    • tmux-continuumstars2.5k Continuous saving of tmux environment. Automatic restore when tmux is started. Automatic tmux start when computer is turned on.
    • tmux-copycatstars961 A plugin that enhances tmux search
    • tmux-fppstars248 Quickly open any path on your terminal window in your $EDITOR of choice!
    • tmux-loggingstars870 Easy logging and screen capturing for Tmux.
    • tmux-openstars516 Tmux key bindings for quick opening of a highlighted file or url
    • tmux-pain-controlstars612 standard pane key-bindings for tmux
    • tmux-resurrectstars9.2k Persists tmux environment across system restarts.
    • tmux-sessioniststars330 Lightweight tmux utils for manipulating sessions
    • tmux-sidebarstars411 A sidebar with the directory tree for the current path. Tries to make tmux more IDE like.
    • tmux-tpmstars8.5k Tmux Plugin Manager
    • tmux-urlviewstars225 Quickly open any url on your terminal window! (No commits since 2016, see tmux-urlscan or tmux-fzf-url for a maintained alternative.)
    • tmux-yankstars2.1k Tmux plugin for copying to system clipboard. Works on OSX, Linux and Cygwin.
• tmux-example-pluginstars37 Example Tmux plugin that actually demonstrates how to build plugins for Tmux
• tmux-teststars14 A small framework for isolated testing of tmux plugins.
